explanations.1: describe() creates a test group with a label; it() defines individual test cases inside that group.
explanations.6: cy.contains() finds an HTML element (here, a link) that displays the text 'Tags', then .click() simulates clicking it.
explanations.10: This clicks a link containing the text 'jomla' — note the typo (should be 'joomla'), which the cspell comment on line 9 tells the spell-checker to ignore.
